change_comments.message:
Hi lee Anjella, I was just having a quick look to get an ide of the latest in this Epic.
I do have some question on this patch tough, maybe we can discuss in the morning please?

inline_comments.message:
this method is also test uniqueness, it is important to show that in the name
e.g. isValidUniqueSubscriptionId

But to be honest I think test for valid naming (correct characters etc) should be separate from tets for UNIQUE you probably need to report different errors for each case!
Finally I don't understand why you check the CPS Path heer, is the end user creating a CPS path or is it hardcoded in NCMP I would assume the latter and then you dont need to check the CPS Path (but only the ID itself, do we have any agreement/limitation on what the ID can be ?!)
Constant should be inlined - it is short and only used once

FYI we should validate _subscriptionId_ here or in another method, using:

    cpsValidator.validateNameCharacters(subscriptionId);
